fundamentals.name: ProShares Ultra VIX Short-Term Futures ETF
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The index seeks to offer exposure to market volatility through publicly traded futures markets and is designed to measure the implied volatility of the S&P 500 over 30 days in the future.

news.paragraph: UVXY is a leveraged ETF designed to track the VIX index, often used as a hedging tool or for speculative bets on increased volatility. Recent articles discuss its role as a put option surrogate for S&P 500 bears and a unique hedging tool for uncertain times. However, the leveraged nature means good things do not last, implying significant risk for long-term holders.
